children.heading: .—Membership
children.label: a .—Membership
children.text: Eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the constitution and bylaws of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Governing Body
children.label: b .—Governing Body
children.text: The Civil Air Patrol has a Board of Governors. The composition and responsibilities of the Board of Governors are set forth in .section 9497 of title 10
